layout.container: h-screen w-full flex flex-col bg-[#111111] overflow-hidden text-white font-sans
layout.grid: flex-1 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-[400px_1fr] lg:grid-cols-[450px_1fr] overflow-hidden

job_banner.description: Sticky top banner for job persistence.
job_banner.styles: w-full bg-[#C96A2A]/10 border-b border-[#C96A2A]/20 px-4 py-2 flex items-center justify-between text-sm text-[#C96A2A]

left_column.description: Left sidebar container for inputs and controls.
left_column.styles: flex flex-col h-full border-r border-[#2A2A2A] bg-[#111111] overflow-y-auto

right_column.styles: flex flex-col h-full bg-[#151515] p-4 lg:p-6 overflow-hidden relative

upload_zone.description: Drag and drop area for media files.
upload_zone.styles: border-2 border-dashed border-[#2A2A2A] rounded-xl p-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 transition-colors hover:border-[#C96A2A]/50 bg-[#151515] text-[#A1A1AA] hover:text-white cursor-pointer group

model_selector.description: Grid of 4 selectable models (Gemini, YOLO26, YOLO26-Seg, YOLO26-Sem).
model_selector.card_styles: p-4 rounded-lg border border-[#2A2A2A] bg-[#1A1A1A] cursor-pointer transition-all hover:bg-[#222222] hover:border-[#333333]

chat_input.description: Input field for prompts and slash commands. Stick to bottom of left column.
chat_input.wrapper_styles: mt-auto pt-4 pb-4 px-6 border-t border-[#2A2A2A] bg-[#111111] sticky bottom-0
chat_input.input_styles: w-full bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#2A2A2A] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-[#C96A2A] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C96A2A] text-white placeholder-[#A1A1AA]

suggestion_chips.description: Quick follow-up actions or common prompts. Place above chat input.
suggestion_chips.chip_styles: px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#2A2A2A] text-xs text-[#A1A1AA] hover:text-white hover:border-[#C96A2A] transition-colors cursor-pointer

output_panel.description: Main area for viewing visual analysis results.
output_panel.wrapper_styles: flex-1 border border-[#2A2A2A] rounded-xl bg-[#111111] overflow-hidden flex flex-col relative shadow-sm
output_panel.canvas_styles: flex-1 flex items-center justify-center p-4 overflow-hidden relative
output_panel.text_results_styles: p-4 border-t border-[#2A2A2A] bg-[#151515] text-sm text-[#E4E4E7] font-mono overflow-y-auto max-h-[30%]

progress_bar.wrapper_styles: w-full h-1.5 bg-[#2A2A2A] rounded-full overflow-hidden mt-4

skeleton_loader.description: Skeleton for processing states. No spinners.
skeleton_loader.styles: animate-pulse bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-xl w-full h-full absolute inset-0

inline_error.description: Error message display instead of toasts.
inline_error.styles: text-[#EF4444] text-xs font-medium mt-1 flex items-center gap-1

interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must lighten their background or border slightly and boost contrast. Text must become #FFFFFF on hover.
interactions.focus_states: Visible focus ring required: focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C96A2A] focus:border-[#C96A2A]
interactions.animations: Subtle skeleton pulsing for loaders. Progress bar must use a smooth CSS width transition. Model card selection scale: active:scale-[0.98].

accessibility.contrast: Text must meet WCAG AA standards. Buttons must have a minimum 3:1 contrast ratio against the #111111 background.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have the data-testid attributes defined in the components section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page React app (no react-router).

Layout Strategy: Create a full-height screen (h-screen) with a top banner and a 2-column grid. Set overflow-hidden on the main container, allowing ONLY the left sidebar to scroll vertically (overflow-y-auto).
Left Column Layout: Should contain the Upload Zone, Model Selector (2x2 grid), and the Chat Input sticky at the bottom.
Right Column Layout: Should house the Output Panel, extending full height. Inside, use flex layout to position the image/video canvas at the top and the text results pane at the bottom.
Theme Enforcement: Strictly adhere to the dark mode palette. Background is #111111, accents are #C96A2A. Do not use generic gray or blue accents. Do NOT implement a light mode toggle.
Typography: Use 'Outfit' from Google Fonts for all general text and headings. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for text results and slash commands.
Components: Use pure Tailwind CSS and headless UI patterns. For form elements, customize them to match the dark earthy tech theme without using standard light-mode Shadcn presets.
Interactivity: When an image/video is selected, replace the Upload Zone with a minimal file preview.
Loading State: Do NOT use loading spinners. Implement the provided skeleton_loader classes overlaying the output canvas while processing.

Error Handling: All errors MUST be rendered inline below the relevant component (e.g. invalid file type shown right under the dropzone in text-[#EF4444]). Do not use global toast notifications for validation errors.
Slash Commands: Build a slash command popover inside the Chat Input that triggers when the user types '/'.
Testing: You MUST assign the provided data-testid attributes to all interactive elements to ensure test pass rates.
